title: Outdoor Sectional Ottoman / Accent Table
summary: A chunky 2x4 cube that works as an ottoman or a side table for a modern outdoor sectional. All exterior screws, one afternoon.
description:
This is the versatile piece in a modular outdoor set — build it once and it's an ottoman when you want to put your feet up and a side table when you set a tray on it. It matches the scale of a simple 2x4 sectional, so it reads as part of the set rather than an afterthought.

Construction is dead simple: a 2x4 seat frame, four short legs, and a slatted top, all fastened with exterior deck screws. The one technique worth knowing is toe-screwing the legs at a slight angle from inside the frame — a small angle on the screw pulls the leg tight and kills the wobble that straight-in screws leave.

Build it from cedar or another outdoor-appropriate species and use exterior screws throughout, since this lives outside. Space the top slats evenly with small gaps so rain drains and the top doesn't cup.

tools.note: Or a miter saw for the square crosscuts.

materials.name: 2x4, 8 ft
materials.note: Frame, legs, and tabletop slats. Cedar or another outdoor-appropriate species.

steps.title: Build the seat frame
steps.body: Attach the seat frame boards together with 2-1/2" exterior screws, two per joint, to form the rectangular frame. Keep it square.

steps.title: Attach the legs
steps.body: Attach the legs from inside the seat frame into the back of each leg, two screws per joint. Drive the screws at a slight angle — that little angle pulls the joint tight and prevents wobble.

steps.title: Add the tabletop slats
steps.body: Lay out the six tabletop slats, spacing them evenly with small gaps for drainage, and screw them down. Mark the screw locations first for a neater finished look.

steps.title: Add the end trim
steps.body: Attach the 2x2 trim to the ends of the tabletop slats and across the tops of the legs to tie the top together and finish the edges.

images.alt: A chunky 2x4 outdoor ottoman that doubles as an accent table for a sectional
